notableEvents.label: Jahmai Jones GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jahmai Jones grounds into a double play, third baseman Colson Montgomery to second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Miguel Vargas. Spencer Torkelson out at 2nd. Jahmai Jones out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jahmai Jones rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jahmai Jones grounds into a double play, third baseman Colson Montgomery to second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Miguel Vargas. Spencer Torkelson out at 2nd. Jahmai Jones out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Riley Greene reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Tigers challenged (force play), call on the field was overturned: Riley Greene reaches on a fielding error by right fielder Randal Grichuk. Matt Vierling to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Colt Keith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colt Keith flies out to center fielder Rikuu Nishida.

notableEvents.label: Zach McKinstry pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Zach McKinstry strikes out swinging, catcher Edgar Quero to first baseman Miguel Vargas.

notableEvents.label: Gage Workman pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Gage Workman grounds out, pitcher Seranthony Domínguez to first baseman Miguel Vargas.

notableEvents.label: Colt Keith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colt Keith flies out to left fielder Sam Antonacci.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Framber Valdez. Chase Meidroth scores. Miguel Vargas to 3rd. Colson Montgomery to 2nd.
